# Footdoot

> Footdoot is an AI-powered footwear marketplace that helps people find their
> perfect shoe fit and shop with confidence online. Core differentiators: foot
> scanning for cross-brand size recommendations, AR virtual try-on, comfort-score
> prediction, and a curated catalog of 1000+ styles from top brands.

## Key facts
- Tagline: "Your perfect fit. Anywhere."
- Foot scanning measures length, width and arch to recommend the right size per brand (a size 9 in one brand may fit like an 8.5 in another).
- Virtual Try-On uses AR so shoppers see shoes on their own feet before buying.
- 7-day easy returns and exchange on all orders.
- 100% authentic products sourced from top brands.
- Categories: Sneakers, Sports Shoes, Formal Shoes, Sandals & Floaters, Heels, Flats, Boots, Accessories.
- Brands include Nike, adidas, PUMA, Skechers, Reebok, New Balance, ALDO, Clarks, Campus, Red Tape.

## Contact
- Support: support@footdoot.com
- Phone: +91 98765 43210 (Mon–Sat, 9AM–9PM)
